Your host Dr. Rev. Madelaine Gomes Ms.C.D.
Dr. Rev. Metaphysical Science (USA)
Author  ·  Business Adviser  ·  International Speaker

Dr. Rev. Madelaine Gomes is a former corporate Director in HR and staff solutions and an Advisor to the Harvard Publication Board.

She bridges the worlds of business, leadership, neuroscience, and Theocentric wisdom to support transformation in individuals and organisations.

As a keynote speaker, author, and Doctor of Metaphysical Science, she integrates mindset alchemy, Hermetic principles, and human development with practical business strategy — helping leaders simplify complexity, strengthen teams, and build thriving, purpose-driven organisations.

"Build with clarity, wisdom, and purpose — from anywhere in the world."
